title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. affinis
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. affinis is a subspecies of the pincushion flower, a perennial plant belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its flavonoids and saponins, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Scabiosa columbaria subsp. affinis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, but its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to limited scientific research on its effectiveness and potential side effects.
